hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git push")) then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"QUALITY GATE: You just pushed to git. Before declaring this work done you MUST run the pr-checklist skill (or check .claude/pr-guidelines.md for this repo requirements). Do not tell the user the work is done until the full checklist passes."}} | tojson else empty end'
